name: 1911 Gold Corporation
description: 1911 Gold Corporation is a junior gold producer and exploration company that holds a highly prospective land package in the Rice Lake greenstone belt in Manitoba, Canada. The company's primary asset is the Rice Lake gold property, which includes the True North mine and mill complex in Bissett, Manitoba. 1911 Gold is focused on exploring its extensive land holdings to identify high-grade gold targets and expand its mineral resources while maintaining its existing processing infrastructure.
